name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Safety Contract
purpose: Define future publish safety requirements while keeping actual publish forbidden in the current MVP.
required_preflight_checks: publish readiness report generated with writes_performed 0
diagnostic artifact generated under storage/app/builder-publish-readiness only
publish dry-run generated under storage/app/builder-publish-dry-runs only
dry-run review checklist inspected without approval persistence
candidate snapshot created under storage/app/builder-publish-candidates only
human approval gate reviewed; approval request persistence exists but does not publish
approval request persisted without publish execution
preview output confirms zero runtime writes before publish
required_snapshots: database backup or table snapshot when destructive or schema-changing work is planned

preview_vs_publish_difference.preview: Writes disposable artifacts under storage/app/module-builder-preview and records preview metadata. It does not change the running application.
preview_vs_publish_difference.publish: Future operation that writes runtime module files, may run migrations, registers routes/menus/permissions, updates caches, and requires backup plus rollback.

rollback_requirements: rollback manifest created before runtime writes
agent_notes: AI Builder Agent may explain or draft a publish plan.
AI Builder Agent must not execute publish, migrations, runtime writes, or rollback.
Publish implementation needs a separate safety-critical task.
